caption:
OpenAI has launched the GPT-5.5-Cyber model, outperforming Anthropic's Mythos on key cybersecurity benchmarks. The new Codex Security plugin has already scanned over 30 million commits across more than 30,000 codebases, leading to significant vulnerability fixes. f4a1f680

How will this impact cybersecurity practices?

Sources: The Decoder, OpenAI
